ViewConfigData Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ViewConfigData type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
UseAsDefault
Indicates whether this configuration should be used as the default for the related view.
ViewId
Gets or sets the ID of the related view.
